content: A team of sales prospecting AI agents can improve their lead conversion efficiency and reduce redundant prospecting effort by adopting uncertainty-based memory sample selection to prioritize following up with leads that the team is most uncertain about (e.g., unresponsive mid-sized prospects with mixed buying signals) instead of always re-engaging clear low-fit or high-fit leads. This approach lets the active sales agent team focus limited outreach capacity on the highest information-gain prospects that most move the needle on closing more deals.
source_topics: Uncertainty-based memory sample selection for deep active agents
